[approach] Move the gripper toward the object. | goal: move the object from right to left
[pick] Grasp the object (low Z). | goal: move the object from right to left
[move][move_left] Move and transport the object to the left. | goal: move the object from right to left
[place] Release the object at the target. | goal: move the object from right to left
[return] Go back toward the initial pose. | goal: move the object from right to left
